title: Custom Mob Attributes
description: Configure health, attack damage, movement speed and scale of every mob.
body:
This mod lets you configure the health, attack damage, movement speed and scale of each mob. The perfect mod if you want to make the game either harder or easier.

# Features
You can configure the following values of every mob individually:
- ![heart_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/434af4c43c449dd030f8a8808d2741ddc9824566.png) health
- ![attack_damage_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ecb1e19c822655e5da25d2779ac09e907c19d86.png) attack damage
- ![movement_speed_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f46f5d526c17c5a8d3967895fb4f25a41419daab.png) movement speed
- ![scale_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aed45464d92e8d667f3b963de2206df50de4dae.png) scale

### What makes this mod special
- Everything can be configured seperately
- Even baby mobs can be configured seperately, if you want to
- Projectiles of mobs are also affected by the configuration (for example: a shot arrow of a skeleton will also be affected)
- Full support for every listed minecraft version including updates to newly released versions

### Configuration
- Configuration is done through multipliers which multiply the vanilla values
- Changing values also applies to already spawned mobs
- Configuration is applied in-game (no need to restart your game or to rejoin your world)
- Super lightweight due to the attributes only changing at the start of the game or if a value gets changed

![Super fast spider](https://imgur.com/1AsAr6W.gif) ![huge warden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/540e4bdad8039a224ce0ea239374ce8908bf7c37_0.webp)

### How to navigate
The list of multipliers is very long so here are a few tips how to navigate through them quickly:
- Mobs are sorted alphabetically. If you're searching for a specific mob, try jumping to the corresponding letter.
- Use the search function in the config menu

### Mod Mobs
<details>
<summary>Currently this mod supports these other mods and their mobs</summary>

- [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/project/gc8OEnCC)
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/project/MpzVLzy5)
- [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/project/fnAffV0n)
- [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/project/POQ2i9zu)
- [Illager Invasion](https://modrinth.com/project/jSV9w0J5)
- [It Takes a Pillage Continuation](https://modrinth.com/project/QOJOg1gE)
- [Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/project/jnEFf2VO)
- [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/project/8YcE8y4T)
- [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/project/CFX9ftUJ)
- [Variants&Ventures](https://modrinth.com/project/lNDRiXkY)
- [Zombie Variants](https://modrinth.com/project/b9aFBeGb)

</details>

Keep in mind that these modded mobs may not function perfectly. If you encounter any issues please report them on my discord or on github.

If you want a mod to be added to this list please tell me on my discord or on github.

# Dependencies
This mod requires the following other mods as dependencies:

### Fabric
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)

Although it is not required, [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is highly recommended.

### Forge
Although it is not required, [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) is highly recommended.

# Support
If you have questions, encounter problems, find bugs or have suggestions you can join my discord server:

[![Fneifnox's Mods Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65d0cb3b474c0517d6d0e11b8f77c2276edf08f.png)](https://discord.gg/bszSDCq5ms)
